corrected_fields.summary: This source is a data dictionary page from the BIS Quarterly Review explaining notation conventions (abbreviations for scales, units, missing values), currency codes, and country codes used in BIS publications. It contains no market-relevant analysis, policy discussion, or macro catalyst information.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source has no relevance to market structure or macro catalysts. It is purely a technical reference page documenting formatting standards for BIS statistical publications. It contains no actionable information for financial research, trading, or investment analysis.
